title: Alligator Loki
content:
{{Otheruses|Loki}} {{CharHub|Alligator Loki|Loki}} {{AltUniverse|3=Characters}} {{Character |image = Alligator Loki Official.jpg |real name = Loki {{ConjecNameAU|Laufeyson}}{{Ref|LK104}}This character's surname is derived from a Variant from ''[[Thor: The Dark World Prelude|Thor: The Dark World Prelude, Issue #2]]'' and thus is conjecturally treated as the same. |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Alligator Loki[https://www.marvel.com/articles/tv-shows/glorious-alligator-loki ‘Loki’: The Glorious Debut of Alligator Loki]}} |affiliation = [[Kid Loki's Crew]] |species = {{WPS|Alligator}} |gender = Fluid[[:File:Loki Promo File.jpeg|Loki's TVA File]] |tv series = ''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]''
*''[[The Nexus Event]]''
*''[[Journey Into Mystery]]'' |docuseries = ''[[Legends]]''
*''[[Variants]]'' |actor = [[Wally]] (visual reference) |status = Alive}} {{Quote|He's overly sensitive like the rest of us."
"Hang on, are you telling me that thing's a Loki too?"
"Oh, yes.|[[Classic Loki]] and [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]|Journey Into Mystery}} '''Loki {{ConjecNameAU|Laufeyson}}''' is a Variant of [[Loki]] who was pruned by the [[Time Variance Authority]] for eating a neighbor's [[cat]] and banished to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]. ==Biography== {{MD|Loki Laufeyson (Earth-TRN869)}} ===Early Life=== ====Arrested by the TVA==== {{Quote|At least my nexus event wasn't eating the wrong neighbor's [[cat]].|[[Boastful Loki]] to Alligator Loki|Journey Into Mystery}} In his timeline, Loki was either born or turned into an alligator. One day, he reportedly ate a neighbor's [[cat]] and was detained by the [[Time Variance Authority]] for creating a nexus event which caused a detour from the Sacred Timeline as he was supposed to eat another neighbor's cat. He was then subsequently pruned and sent to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], where he met [[Kid Loki]], [[Classic Loki]], and [[Boastful Loki]].{{Ref|LK105}} ===Time in the Void=== ====Encountering Another Loki==== {{Quote|Why the hell is there an {{WPS|alligator}} in here?!"
"He's a Loki!|[[President Loki]], [[Classic Loki]] and [[Kid Loki]]|Journey Into Mystery}} [[File:The Tree Amigos.png|{{AltFloat}}|Alligator Loki meets [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]]] One day in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], Alligator Loki, along with [[Kid Loki]], [[Classic Loki]] and [[Boastful Loki]] came across another [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki Variant]] and insisted he follow them to escape Alioth.{{Ref|LK104}} [[File:Alligator Loki listens.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Alligator Loki listens]] As they made their way across the Void, Loki demanded an explanation for his current whereabouts, forcing Kid Loki to silence him to avoid being detected by Alioth. The Variants proceed to explain to him the purpose of Alioth and the Void, which Classic Loki compared to a shark in a shark tank. Alligator Loki suggested they refer to the Void as an alligator tank but Classic Loki gently insisted that no such thing existed and that his explanation was a better metaphor. Alligator Loki accompanied Kid Loki, Classic Loki, Boastful Loki, and Loki back to their hideout underground, as they were keeping hidden from the [[Alioth]]. In their lair, Alligator Loki soaked in a water container while listening as Loki was caught up about them by the other Loki Variants. As Boastful Loki claimed that he killed Captain America and Iron Man before claiming the [[Infinity Stones]], Alligator Loki growled while at the same time calling him a liar. In response, Boastful Loki retorted that his own Nexus Event wasn't as pathetic as eating the wrong neighbor's cat, provoking Alligator Loki into attempting bite his hand off, forcing Loki and Classic Loki to break up the fight and toss Alligator Loki back in his pool.{{Ref|LK105}} ====Ambush at the Loki Palace==== [[File:Alligator Loki bites President Loki.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Alligator Loki bites [[President Loki]]'s hand off]] When Loki decided to leave them to pursue the [[Alioth]] himself, [[President Loki]] and his crew found Loki and the others in their lair. Classic Loki accused Loki of betraying them, only for Boastful Loki to reveal himself as the traitor with the intention of taking Kid Loki's throne and President Loki's army. However, President reneges on his deal to take the throne for himself, only for his army to turn on him. Alligator Loki then jumped up and bit President Loki's hand off, sparking a brawl amidst the Loki Variants. Kid Loki picked Alligator Loki up and fled through Classic Loki's [[Wormhole|portal]] with Loki following behind. [[File:Alligator Loki fire.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Alligator Loki listens to [[Mobius M. Mobius]]]] Upon exiting, Classic and Kid Loki lament that every version of themselves are doomed to self-destructive fates, Loki convinced them to help him fight Alioth. As they arrived at [[Alioth]]'s location, Alligator Loki made a growl, which Loki assumed was a show of support before Classic Loki clarified that he was praying, as he feared they were committing suicide.{{Ref|LK105}} ====Meeting Sylvie and Mobius==== Shortly, Alligator Loki and the others were found by [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] and [[Mobius M. Mobius]]; Laufeydottir was puzzled to learn of Alligator Loki. Alligator Loki listened inside a hut next to a campfire as Mobius talked with Classic Loki and Kid Loki about the [[Time Variance Authority|TVA]]. Mobius was skeptical about whether Alligator Loki was a real Loki as he had never heard of an alligator Variant of Loki and suggested he might be lying about his identity and playing the long game however, Mobius then noted that would be a Loki-like thing to do. [[File:Alligator Loki smiles.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Alligator Loki leaves with [[Kid Loki]]]] After Mobius was given a [[TemPad]], he asked Kid Loki and Classic Loki if they wanted to escape the Void, but they, along with Alligator Loki wanted to stay behind. Alligator Loki and Kid Loki then said their goodbyes to Loki and Laufeydottir and set off, while Classic Loki stayed behind to assist the other two.{{Ref|LK105}} {{Clear}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Alligator Physiology''': Loki is an alligator, possessing features such as scales, sharp teeth, and a tail. His teeth allowed him to bite through [[President Loki]]'s skin and eat off his hand. ===Abilities=== *'''Bilingualism''': Loki is able to speak alligator and understand English. ==Equipment== ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Horned Helmet]]''': Similar to many of his Variants, Loki possesses a golden horned helmet. ==Facilities== *'''[[Loki Palace]]''': While in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], Alligator Loki lived in the Loki Palace next to [[Kid Loki]], [[Classic Loki]] and [[Boastful Loki]]. *'''[[Dom's Cuts]]''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Kid Loki's Crew]] - Alternate Selves **[[Kid Loki]] - Leader and Friend **[[Classic Loki]] † **[[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] *[[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] - Alternate Self *[[Mobius M. Mobius]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Time Variance Authority]] *[[Alioth]] - Attempted Killer *[[Loki Bandits]] - Alternate Selves **[[President Loki]] **[[Mustache Loki]] **[[Glamshades Loki]] **[[Bicycle Loki]] **[[Pokey Loki]] **[[Warrior Loki]] **[[Ninja Loki]] **[[Assassin Loki]] **[[Goth Loki]] **[[Military Loki]] *[[Boastful Loki]] - Alternate Self and Former Ally {{Col-end}} ==Behind the Scenes== *Alligator Loki was created for the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] by ''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]'' head writer [[Michael Waldron]]. While discussing about including multiple [[Hub:Loki|Lokis]] in the show, Waldron suggested including an alligator Loki because of the alligator's green color.[https://www.marvel.com/articles/tv-shows/glorious-alligator-loki ‘Loki’: The Glorious Debut of Alligator Loki] **Waldron also celebrated his birthday in ''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]'''s studio with a cake of Alligator Loki in 2019.[https://twitter.com/michaelwaldron/status/1413469866116399107 Michael Waldron on Twitter] *According to writer [[Eric Martin]], Alligator Loki was inspired by [[Wally]], a real-life support animal, who served as a visual reference for the character.[https://twitter.com/MrEricMartin/status/1413586045338210304 Eric Martin on Twitter] ==References== {{Gallery|Alligator Loki/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Loki}} [[ru:Рептилия Локи]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Loki (TV series) Characters]] [[Category:Legends Characters]] [[Category:Creatures]] [[Category:Kid Loki's Crew Members]] [[Category:Genderfluid Characters]] [[Category:No Hair]] [[Category:Yellow Eyes]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]] [[Category:LGBTQIA+ Characters]] [[Category:Variants Monitored by the TVA]] [[Category:Pruned]]
